title: R&D: Local AI integration
description: Explore patterns for adding local-only AI assistance inside a restricted engineering workstation.
currentContext: The useful path seems to be a local model runner behind a small command wrapper. No cloud calls, telemetry, credential storage, or background service are acceptable. The next discussion should focus on model packaging and approved artifact distribution.
nextActions: Compare approved local model packaging options
Write risk note for prompt/content retention
Sketch command-line handoff flow for code review summaries
